message.content:
@startuml
actor user as User1
actor user as User2

participant runtime
participant ibex
participant ibex.sklearn
participant loader
participant sklearn.linear_model

User1 --> runtime : 1 import ibex.sklearn.linear_model
runtime --> ibex : 2 import ibex
runtime --> ibex.sklearn : 3 import ibex.sklearn
ibex.sklearn --> ibex : 4 register sys.metapath
runtime --> loader : 5 import ibex.sklearn.linear_model
loader --> sklearn.linear_model : 6 dir
sklearn.linear_model --> loader : 7 members
loader --> sklearn.linear_model : 8 inspect
sklearn.linear_model --> loader : 9 wrap

@enduml
